name: toast
title: Toast
description: Transient notifications that slide in and stack.

files.content:
toaster.pause(toast.id)} onpointerleave={() => toaster.resume(toast.id)} >

{toast.title}

{#if toast.description}

{toast.description}

{/if} {#if toast.action} {/if}
{#if toast.duration > 0}
{/if}

{#each toaster.toasts as toast (toast.id)}
{/each}
